description:
As a logged-in customer
  I want to add one product to the cart and complete the checkout
  So that I can confirm my order is placed successfully

elements.name: Complete checkout for one product and see order confirmation

steps.name: I am logged in as a standard user
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the cart
I proceed to checkout
I fill in my shipping information with "John" "Doe" "12345"
I continue to the order summary
I finish the order
I should see the order confirmation message

elements.name: Order summary subtotal matches the product price

steps.name: I am logged in as a standard user
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the cart
I proceed to checkout
I fill in my shipping information with "John" "Doe" "12345"
I continue to the order summary
the subtotal should match the product price

elements.name: Show validation error when shipping info is missing

steps.name: I am logged in as a standard user
I add the first product to the cart
I navigate to the cart
I proceed to checkout
I submit the checkout form without filling any field
I should see the error "First Name is required"

name: Checkout a single product on SauceDemo
